---
title: "standerlize folders"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
import polars as pl
import pandas as pd
import requests
```

```{python}
url = "http://localhost:8051/data/trade/?time=yearly&types=hts&agr=false&group=false"
r = requests.get(url).json()
pd.DataFrame(r).sort_values(by="year")
```
